embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: Embedding provider: 'openai' (requires apiKey), 'ollama' (local, no apiKey needed), or 'onnx' (local ONNX runtime, no apiKey needed). Default: 'openai'.

embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI / Google API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY}). Only required when provider='openai'. Omit for local providers (ollama, onnx).

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Embedding model name. OpenAI: 'text-embedding-3-small' (default) or 'text-embedding-3-large'. Ollama: e.g. 'nomic-embed-text', 'mxbai-embed-large'. ONNX: model identifier (e.g. 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2').

embedding.ollamaModel.label: Ollama Model
embedding.ollamaModel.help: Ollama embedding model name (alias for 'model' when provider='ollama'). E.g. 'nomic-embed-text' (768-dim), 'mxbai-embed-large' (1024-dim), 'all-minilm' (384-dim). Requires Ollama running locally.

embedding.onnxModelPath.label: ONNX Model Path
embedding.onnxModelPath.help: ONNX model path or identifier (alias for 'model' when provider='onnx'). E.g. 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2' (384-dim), 'bge-small-en-v1.5' (384-dim). No API key required.

embedding.onnxTokenizerPath.label: ONNX Tokenizer Path
embedding.onnxTokenizerPath.help: Path to ONNX tokenizer JSON file

embedding.onnxDimensions.label: ONNX Dimensions
embedding.onnxDimensions.help: Embedding output dimensions for the ONNX model

embedding.batchSize.label: Embedding batch size
embedding.batchSize.help: Facts per batch when running embedding backfill/migration. If omitted, the config parser defaults to 40 (#901). Provider-specific batch limits (OpenAI, Ollama, ONNX) still apply inside each provider.

mode.label: Configuration preset
mode.help: local | minimal | enhanced | complete (or legacy: essential | normal | expert | full, mapped to local). See CONFIGURATION-MODES.md.

llm.nano.label: LLM tier: nano (cheapest)
llm.nano.help: Ordered model IDs for high-volume, low-stakes calls: HyDE, auto-classify, classify-before-write, summarization. Prefer nano/mini/flash-lite deployments first. If unset, nano reuses llm.default. CLI: openclaw hybrid-mem config-set llm.nano '["azure-foundry/gpt-4.1-nano"]'

llm.default.label: LLM tier: default
llm.default.help: General maintenance, reflection, and dream-cycle / MEMORY_INDEX when nightlyCycle.model is not set. Put a small-but-capable model first; reserve bigger models as fallbacks. CLI: openclaw hybrid-mem config-set llm.default '["azure-foundry/gpt-4.1-mini","azure-foundry/gpt-5.4"]'

llm.heavy.label: LLM tier: heavy
llm.heavy.help: Distillation, self-correction, and other quality-critical steps. Safe to list stronger models here; they are not used for every retrieval helper. CLI: openclaw hybrid-mem config-set llm.heavy '["azure-foundry/gpt-5.4"]'

llm.disabledProviders.label: Disabled LLM providers
llm.disabledProviders.help: JSON array of provider ids to exclude from model resolution (e.g. openai, anthropic, google, ollama). CLI: openclaw hybrid-mem config-set llm.disabledProviders '["anthropic"]'

nightlyCycle.model.label: Dream cycle model override
nightlyCycle.model.help: Optional. When set, nightly dream cycle and MEMORY_INDEX LLM use this model instead of llm.default[0]. Leave unset to follow llm.default. CLI: openclaw hybrid-mem config-set nightlyCycle.model azure-foundry/gpt-4.1-mini

distill.extractionModelTier.label: Distill extraction tier
distill.extractionModelTier.help: Which LLM tier to use for directive/reinforcement extraction from sessions: nano (cheapest), default, or heavy. Presets minimal/enhanced default to nano. CLI: openclaw hybrid-mem config-set distill.extractionModelTier nano

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories (true/false or object with enabled, maxTokens, maxPerMemoryChars)

autoRecall.maxPerMemoryChars.label: Auto-Recall max chars per memory
autoRecall.maxPerMemoryChars.help: Truncate each memory to N chars; 0 = no truncation

autoRecall.injectionFormat.label: Auto-Recall injection format
autoRecall.injectionFormat.help: full | short | minimal | progressive | progressive_hybrid (progressive = index; progressive_hybrid = pinned in full + rest as index)

autoRecall.recallTiming.label: Recall timing logs
autoRecall.recallTiming.help: off | basic | verbose. basic logs per-phase completed durations and counts; verbose adds started events and ISO timestamps.

autoRecall.limit.label: Auto-Recall limit
autoRecall.limit.help: Max memories to consider for injection (default 10)

autoRecall.preferLongTerm.label: Auto-Recall prefer long-term
autoRecall.preferLongTerm.help: Boost score for permanent/stable facts so they rank higher when scores are close (default false)

autoRecall.useImportanceRecency.label: Auto-Recall use importance/recency
autoRecall.useImportanceRecency.help: Combine relevance with importance and lastConfirmedAt so more important or recently confirmed facts rank higher (default false)

autoRecall.entityLookup.label: Auto-Recall entity lookup
autoRecall.entityLookup.help: When the prompt mentions an entity, merge lookup(entity) facts. If `entities` is empty and `autoFromFacts` is true (default), names come from DISTINCT entity on stored facts (capped by maxAutoEntities).

autoRecall.entityLookup.autoFromFacts.label: Entity lookup: auto from facts DB
autoRecall.entityLookup.autoFromFacts.help: When true (default) and `entities` is empty, use distinct `entity` values from the facts table (up to maxAutoEntities). Set false to require an explicit `entities` list.

autoRecall.entityLookup.maxAutoEntities.label: Entity lookup: max auto names
autoRecall.entityLookup.maxAutoEntities.help: Cap for auto-loaded entity names from the DB (default 500, max 2000).

autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.enabled.label: Retrieval directives
autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.enabled.help: Enable targeted recall triggers (entity mention, keyword, task type, session start)

autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.entityMen.label: Directive: entity mentioned
autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.entityMen.help: When prompt mentions an entity, run a targeted recall for that entity (default: true)

autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.keywords.label: Directive keywords
autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.keywords.help: Keyword triggers to run targeted recall (case-insensitive).

autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.taskTypes.label: Directive task types
autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.taskTypes.help: Task-type triggers mapping (taskType -> keywords to match).

autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.sessionSt.label: Directive session start
autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.sessionSt.help: Run a targeted recall once when a new session starts (default: false)

autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.maxPerPro.label: Directive max per prompt
autoRecall.retrievalDirectives.maxPerPro.help: Hard cap on directive recalls per prompt to limit latency (default: 4)

autoRecall.summaryThreshold.label: Summary threshold (chars)
autoRecall.summaryThreshold.help: Facts longer than this get a summary stored; 0 = disabled (default 300)

autoRecall.useSummaryInInjection.label: Use summary in injection
autoRecall.useSummaryInInjection.help: Inject summary instead of full text when present (default true)

autoRecall.summarizeWhenOverBudget.label: Summarize when over budget
autoRecall.summarizeWhenOverBudget.help: When token cap forces dropping memories, LLM-summarize all into 2-3 sentences (1.4)

autoRecall.summarizeModel.label: Summarize model
autoRecall.summarizeModel.help: Model for summarize-when-over-budget (when unset, resolved at runtime)

autoRecall.progressiveMaxCandidates.label: Progressive max candidates
autoRecall.progressiveMaxCandidates.help: Max memories in progressive index (default 15). Used when injectionFormat is progressive or progressive_hybrid.

autoRecall.progressiveIndexMaxTokens.label: Progressive index max tokens
autoRecall.progressiveIndexMaxTokens.help: Token cap for the index block in progressive mode (default: 300 when injectionFormat is progressive or progressive_hybrid)

autoRecall.progressiveGroupByCategory.label: Progressive group by category
autoRecall.progressiveGroupByCategory.help: Group index lines by category for readability (default false)

autoRecall.progressivePinnedRecallCount.label: Progressive pinned recall count
autoRecall.progressivePinnedRecallCount.help: In progressive_hybrid: facts with recallCount >= this or permanent decay are injected in full (default 3)

autoRecall.interactiveEnrichment.label: Interactive recall enrichment
autoRecall.interactiveEnrichment.help: Single knob for chat-turn cost/latency: fast = no HyDE + no ambient multi-query; balanced (default) = respect queryExpansion.skipForInteractiveTurns and ambient.*; full = HyDE when query expansion is on + ambient multi-query path when ambient is configured.

autoRecall.authFailure.enabled.label: Auth failure auto-recall
autoRecall.authFailure.enabled.help: Detect authentication failures and auto-inject relevant credentials (default: true)

autoRecall.authFailure.patterns.label: Auth failure patterns
autoRecall.authFailure.patterns.help: Additional regex patterns to detect auth failures (merged with defaults). Should NOT include default patterns to avoid duplication.

autoRecall.authFailure.maxRecallsPerTarg.label: Max recalls per target
autoRecall.authFailure.maxRecallsPerTarg.help: Max times to recall credentials for the same target per session. 0 = unlimited (default: 1)

autoRecall.authFailure.includeVaultHints.label: Include vault hints
autoRecall.authFailure.includeVaultHints.help: Inject credential hints even if they're stored in the vault (default: true)

captureMaxChars.label: Capture max characters
captureMaxChars.help: Max characters per fact: filter in auto-capture and truncate when storing (default 5000)

categories.label: Custom Categories
categories.help: Additional memory categories beyond the defaults (preference, fact, decision, entity, other)

autoClassify.enabled.label: Auto-Classify
autoClassify.enabled.help: Use a cheap LLM to classify 'other' facts into proper categories on capture and via CLI

autoClassify.model.label: Classify Model
autoClassify.model.help: Cheap/fast model for classification (when unset, resolved at runtime)

autoClassify.suggestCategories.label: Suggest categories
autoClassify.suggestCategories.help: Let LLM suggest new categories from 'other' facts; labels with ≥ minFactsForNewCategory become real categories

autoClassify.minFactsForNewCategory.label: Min facts for new category
autoClassify.minFactsForNewCategory.help: Minimum facts with same suggested label before creating that category (default 10); not told to the LLM

store.fuzzyDedupe.label: Store fuzzy dedupe
store.fuzzyDedupe.help: Skip storing when normalized text (trim, collapse whitespace, lowercase) matches an existing fact (2.3)

store.classifyBeforeWrite.label: Classify before write
store.classifyBeforeWrite.help: Classify each new fact as ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP against similar facts before storing; reduces duplicates and contradictions

store.classifyModel.label: Classification model
store.classifyModel.help: Model for ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP classification when classifyBeforeWrite is on. When unset, uses the nano-tier default; set explicitly if that tier points at a chatty or non-JSON-steady model (e.g. some MiniMax endpoints) to avoid extra latency from batch-parse fallback

credentials.enabled.label: Credentials
credentials.enabled.help: Opt-in encrypted credential store for API keys, tokens, passwords

credentials.encryptionKey.label: Credentials encryption key
credentials.encryptionKey.help: Use env:VAR_NAME (e.g. env:OPENCLAW_CRED_KEY) or provide 16+ char secret

credentials.autoDetect.label: Credential auto-detect
credentials.autoDetect.help: When enabled, detect API keys/tokens in conversation and prompt to store

credentials.expiryWarningDays.label: Expiry warning days
credentials.expiryWarningDays.help: Warn when credentials expire within this many days (default 7)

errorReporting.enabled.label: Error reporting enabled
errorReporting.enabled.help: Send anonymous error reports to help developers prioritize bug fixes (default: false, opt-in)

errorReporting.consent.label: Error reporting consent
errorReporting.consent.help: Explicit user consent required for error reporting (default: false)

errorReporting.mode.label: Error reporting mode
errorReporting.mode.help: community (anonymous telemetry to developers) or self-hosted (your own Sentry/GlitchTip instance). Default: community

errorReporting.dsn.label: Error reporting DSN
errorReporting.dsn.help: Custom DSN for self-hosted mode. Not needed for community mode.

errorReporting.environment.label: Error reporting environment
errorReporting.environment.help: Environment tag for reported errors (default: production)

errorReporting.botId.label: Error reporting bot ID (UUID)
errorReporting.botId.help: Set this bot's UUID to include it in error reports (GlitchTip groups by bot). Use config-set errorReporting.botId <uuid>. Clear or omit to not send bot ID.

errorReporting.botName.label: Error reporting friendly name
errorReporting.botName.help: Friendly name for this bot; shown in GlitchTip reports. Use config-set errorReporting.botName "MyBot".

errorReporting.updateNudge.enabled.label: Update nudges enabled
errorReporting.updateNudge.enabled.help: Warn when this install falls behind the latest published plugin version (default: true)

errorReporting.updateNudge.intervalHours.label: Update nudge interval (hours)
errorReporting.updateNudge.intervalHours.help: Minimum hours between repeated upgrade reminders on outdated installs (default: 24)

errorReporting.updateNudge.cacheTtlHours.label: Version check cache TTL (hours)
errorReporting.updateNudge.cacheTtlHours.help: How long the cached latest-version result stays fresh before startup relies on a new background check (default: 24)

wal.enabled.label: Write-Ahead Log
wal.enabled.help: Enable WAL for crash resilience - logs memory operations before committing (default: enabled)

wal.walPath.label: WAL file path
wal.walPath.help: Custom path for WAL file (default: same directory as SQLite DB)

wal.maxAge.label: WAL max age (ms)
wal.maxAge.help: Maximum age of WAL entries before considered stale in milliseconds (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)

personaProposals.enabled.label: Persona Proposals
personaProposals.enabled.help: Opt-in agent self-evolution: agents can propose changes to identity files (SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, USER.md) with human approval gate (default: disabled)

personaProposals.autoApply.label: Auto-apply persona proposals
personaProposals.autoApply.help: When true, approved proposals are applied to identity files automatically without human review (default: false). Only enable if you trust the agent to modify SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, USER.md.

personaProposals.allowedFiles.label: Allowed identity files
personaProposals.allowedFiles.help: Identity files that can be modified via proposals (default: all three)

personaProposals.maxProposalsPerWeek.label: Max proposals per week
personaProposals.maxProposalsPerWeek.help: Rate limit to prevent proposal spam (default: 5)

personaProposals.proposalTTLDays.label: Proposal TTL (days)
personaProposals.proposalTTLDays.help: Days before proposals auto-expire if not reviewed (default: 30, 0 = never)

personaProposals.minSessionEvidence.label: Min session evidence
personaProposals.minSessionEvidence.help: Minimum number of session references required (default: 10)

identityReflection.enabled.label: Identity Reflection
identityReflection.enabled.help: Synthesize persona-level insights from reflection outputs into a dedicated store (default: disabled)

identityReflection.defaultWindow.label: Identity reflection window
identityReflection.defaultWindow.help: Days of recent patterns, rules, and meta-patterns to analyze (default: 30)

identityReflection.minInsights.label: Identity min insights
identityReflection.minInsights.help: Minimum reflection insights required before identity reflection runs (default: 3)

identityReflection.maxInsightsPerRun.label: Identity max insights
identityReflection.maxInsightsPerRun.help: Maximum identity insights stored per run (default: 8)

graph.enabled.label: Graph memory
graph.enabled.help: Enable graph-based spreading activation for zero-LLM recall

graph.autoLink.label: Auto-link
graph.autoLink.help: Auto-create RELATED_TO links to similar facts when storing (default false)

graph.autoLinkLimit.label: Auto-link limit
graph.autoLinkLimit.help: Max similar facts to link per storage (default 3)

graph.maxTraversalDepth.label: Max traversal depth
graph.maxTraversalDepth.help: Max hops for graph traversal in recall (default 2)

graph.useInRecall.label: Use in recall
graph.useInRecall.help: Enable graph traversal in memory_recall (default true)

graph.strengthenOnRecall.label: Strengthen on recall
graph.strengthenOnRecall.help: When true, strengthen RELATED_TO links between facts recalled together (default false; Phase 1 baseline off)

procedures.enabled.label: Procedural memory
procedures.enabled.help: Extract tool-call procedures from session logs, inject in recall, auto-generate skills

procedures.minSteps.label: Min steps
procedures.minSteps.help: Minimum tool steps to count as a procedure (default: 2)

procedures.validationThreshold.label: Validation threshold
procedures.validationThreshold.help: Success count before auto-generating a skill (default: 3)

distill.apiKey.label: Gemini API Key (distill)
distill.apiKey.help: For session distillation with Gemini (1M context). Or set GOOGLE_API_KEY env.

distill.defaultModel.label: Distill default model
distill.defaultModel.help: Default LLM for hybrid-mem distill (recommended: gemini-3.1-pro-preview for 1M context and token I/O)

languageKeywords.autoBuild.label: Multi-language auto-build
languageKeywords.autoBuild.help: Build .language-keywords.json from memory samples (triggers, categories, correction signals). Once at startup if missing, then weekly.

reflection.enabled.label: Reflection layer
reflection.enabled.help: Synthesize behavioral patterns from facts; memory_reflect, reflect-rules

reflection.model.label: Reflection model
reflection.model.help: LLM for reflection analysis (when unset, resolved at runtime)

reflection.minObservations.label: Reflection min observations
reflection.minObservations.help: Min observations to support a pattern (default 2)

nightlyCycle.enabled.label: Nightly dream cycle
nightlyCycle.enabled.help: Run automated prune → consolidate → reflect pipeline (cron job nightly-dream-cycle). Default: false.

passiveObserver.enabled.label: Passive observer
passiveObserver.enabled.help: Background fact extraction from session transcripts at interval. Default: false.

extraction.extractionPasses.label: Multi-pass extraction
extraction.extractionPasses.help: Enable multi-pass LLM extraction with verification (Issue #166). Default: false.

selfExtension.enabled.label: Self-extension (tool proposals)
selfExtension.enabled.help: Generate tool proposals from usage-pattern gaps. Requires workflow tracking. Default: false.

crystallization.enabled.label: Crystallization (skill proposals)
crystallization.enabled.help: Generate AgentSkill SKILL.md proposals from workflow patterns. Default: false.

multiAgent.orchestratorId.label: Orchestrator Agent ID
multiAgent.orchestratorId.help: Agent ID of the orchestrator (main agent). This agent sees all scopes. Default: 'main'.

multiAgent.defaultStoreScope.label: Default Store Scope
multiAgent.defaultStoreScope.help: Default scope for new facts: 'global' (all agents, backward compatible), 'agent' (specialists auto-scope), or 'auto' (orchestrator→global, specialists→agent). Default: 'global'.

trajectoryLLMAnalysis.label: Trajectory LLM Analysis
trajectoryLLMAnalysis.help: Use LLM-based trajectory analysis instead of heuristic lesson extraction. Top-level alias for implicitFeedback.trajectoryLLMAnalysis.

feedToSelfCorrection.label: Feed to Self-Correction
feedToSelfCorrection.help: Feed negative implicit signals into the self-correction pipeline. Top-level alias for implicitFeedback.feedToSelfCorrection.

extractReinforcement.label: Extract Reinforcement
extractReinforcement.help: Enable reinforcement extraction from sessions. Top-level alias for distill.extractReinforcement.

activeTask.taskHygiene.heartbeatEscalati.label: Task hygiene on heartbeat
activeTask.taskHygiene.heartbeatEscalati.help: When the last user message matches a heartbeat pattern, append a short active-tasks review nudge (stale rows, optional long-running hint). Uses the same patterns as goal stewardship. Default: true. See docs/TASK-HYGIENE.md.

activeTask.taskHygiene.suggestGoalAfterT.label: Suggest goal after N days
activeTask.taskHygiene.suggestGoalAfterT.help: If greater than 0, heartbeat hygiene flags tasks whose **Updated** timestamp is older than N days and suggests active_task_propose_goal + goal_register. 0 = off (default).

activeTask.taskHygiene.heartbeatNudgeMax.label: Heartbeat hygiene max chars
activeTask.taskHygiene.heartbeatNudgeMax.help: Character cap for the injected task-hygiene block (default 2500; parser minimum 200).

goalStewardship.enabled.label: Goal stewardship
goalStewardship.enabled.help: Enable long-running goal registry, agent tools (goal_register, …), heartbeat injection, and optional watchdog health checks. Default: false. See docs/GOAL-STEWARDSHIP-DESIGN.md.

goalStewardship.goalsDir.label: Goals directory
goalStewardship.goalsDir.help: Relative to workspace (OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE): JSON goal files and index. Default: state/goals.

goalStewardship.heartbeatStewardship.label: Heartbeat stewardship
goalStewardship.heartbeatStewardship.help: Inject stewardship context on heartbeat sessions (pattern-detected). Default: true when goal stewardship is enabled.

goalStewardship.watchdogHealthCheck.label: Watchdog health check
goalStewardship.watchdogHealthCheck.help: Run deterministic goal health checks on the plugin 5-minute timer. CLI `hybrid-mem goals stewardship-run` still runs checks when stewardship is enabled. Default: true.

goalStewardship.circuitBreaker.enabled.label: Goal circuit breaker
goalStewardship.circuitBreaker.enabled.help: When enabled, repeated goal_assess calls with the same blockers (or too many assessments without blocker change) block the goal and write humanEscalationSummary + optional memory/ log. Default: false. See docs/GOAL-STEWARDSHIP-OPERATOR.md.

goalStewardship.circuitBreaker.sameBlock.label: Circuit breaker: same blockers N times
goalStewardship.circuitBreaker.sameBlock.help: Trip after this many consecutive assessments with identical blockers; 0 = off.

goalStewardship.circuitBreaker.maxAssess.label: Circuit breaker: max assessments without progress
goalStewardship.circuitBreaker.maxAssess.help: Trip when (assessments since last blocker change) reaches this; 0 = off.

mode.description: Configuration preset: local | minimal | enhanced | complete. Legacy values (essential, normal, expert, full) are accepted and mapped to local. See docs/CONFIGURATION-MODES.md.

embedding.description: Embedding provider configuration. Use provider='openai' (requires apiKey) or 'ollama'/'onnx' for local inference (no apiKey needed). Examples: {provider:'ollama',model:'nomic-embed-text'} or {provider:'onnx',onnxModelPath:'all-MiniLM-L6-v2'}.

provider.description: Embedding provider. 'openai'/'google' require apiKey. 'ollama' and 'onnx' run locally without an API key.

apiKey.description: Required when provider='openai' or 'google'. Omit for local providers (ollama, onnx). Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

model.description: Embedding model name. OpenAI: 'text-embedding-3-small' (default) or 'text-embedding-3-large'. Ollama: e.g. 'nomic-embed-text'. ONNX: model identifier.

ollamaModel.description: Ollama model name — alias for 'model' when provider='ollama'. E.g. 'nomic-embed-text' (768-dim), 'mxbai-embed-large' (1024-dim), 'all-minilm' (384-dim).

onnxModelPath.description: ONNX model path or identifier — alias for 'model' when provider='onnx'. E.g. 'all-MiniLM-L6-v2' (384-dim), 'bge-small-en-v1.5' (384-dim).

onnxTokenizerPath.description: Path to ONNX tokenizer JSON file

dimensions.description: Vector dimensions. Auto-detected for known models. Required for unknown Ollama/ONNX models not in the built-in list.

endpoint.description: Custom endpoint URL. For Ollama: defaults to 'http://localhost:11434'. For OpenAI-compatible APIs.

deployment.description: Azure OpenAI / API Management: deployment name sent as the API model id when it differs from catalog model (e.g. text-embedding-3-large). Optional when deployment name matches model.

preferredProviders.description: Explicit ordered list of embedding providers to use. When set, only listed providers are tried (in order); auto-inference from available API keys is skipped. Use ["openai"] to pin to Azure/OpenAI only and prevent Google from being auto-added as a fallback when GEMINI_API_KEY is also set. Mixing providers with different vector dimensions is not supported — ensure all listed providers produce the same dimensions as your stored vectors.

batchSize.description: Batch size for embedding migration/backfill (facts per batch). When omitted, the config parser uses 40.

recallTiming.description: Structured recall timing logs: false/off=disabled, true/basic=completed events only, verbose=started+completed with timestamps.

autoFromFacts.description: When true (default) and entities is empty, load names from DISTINCT entity on facts (capped by maxAutoEntities).

maxAutoEntities.description: Max distinct entity names when using autoFromFacts (default 500).

interactiveEnrichment.description: Unified control for interactive auto-recall: fast = lowest latency/cost (no HyDE, no ambient multi-query); balanced = default; full = richer (HyDE + ambient multi when configured).

enabled.description: Detect authentication failures and auto-inject credentials (default: true)

patterns.description: Additional regex patterns to detect auth failures (should NOT duplicate defaults)

maxRecallsPerTarget.description: Max recalls per target per session; 0 = unlimited (default: 1)

includeVaultHints.description: Inject hints even when credentials are in vault (default: true)

categories.description: Custom categories to add alongside defaults

classifyBeforeWrite.description: Classify incoming fact against similar facts (ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP) before storing

classifyModel.description: Model for classify-before-write. When unset, uses nano-tier default; set explicitly if that model often wraps JSON in prose or markdown so batch classification stays on the fast path

encryptionKey.description: Optional. When set (16+ chars or env:VAR), vault is encrypted. When unset, vault is plaintext; user may secure by other means (e.g. filesystem permissions).

autoDetect.description: Detect credential patterns in conversation and prompt to store

toolCalls.description: Scan tool call inputs for credential patterns and store in vault

logCaptures.description: Emit info log on each capture (default: true)

requirePatternMatch.description: Only store when a credential pattern matched (reject value-only; default: false)

autoCapture.description: Auto-capture credentials from tool call inputs

credentials.description: Credential vault: enabled=true. Optionally set encryptionKey (or env:OPENCLAW_CRED_KEY) for encryption; omit for plaintext vault.

enabled.description: Enable error reporting (default: true, opt-out). Set false to disable.

consent.description: User consent for reporting (default: true, opt-out). Set false to disable.

mode.description: community: anonymous telemetry to developers. self-hosted: your own Sentry/GlitchTip instance.

dsn.description: Custom DSN for self-hosted mode. Community mode uses built-in endpoint.

botId.description: Optional UUID identifying this bot instance; sent as tag so GlitchTip can group errors by bot.

botName.description: Optional friendly name for this bot; sent as tag for readable reports.

enabled.description: Warn when this install falls behind the latest published plugin version.

intervalHours.description: Hours between repeated upgrade reminders on outdated installs. 0 disables nudges (keeps muting active).

cacheTtlHours.description: How long cached latest-version results stay fresh before startup trusts a new background check instead.

updateNudge.description: Controls user-facing upgrade reminders for the version-aware telemetry mute flow.

errorReporting.description: Opt-out error reporting to GlitchTip/Sentry (enabled by default, community DSN). Set enabled: false or consent: false to disable. See docs/ERROR-REPORTING.md.

distill.description: Session distillation via llm.heavy tier (default: azure-foundry/gpt-5.4-pro). No separate API key required.

defaultModel.description: Model override for distill (default: azure-foundry/gpt-5.4-pro or llm.heavy tier)

extractDirectives.description: Enable directive extraction from sessions (default: true)

extractReinforcement.description: Enable reinforcement extraction from sessions (default: true)

reinforcementBoost.description: Reinforcement boost added to facts search score (default: 0.1)

reinforcementPromotionThreshold.description: Reinforcements to trigger auto-promotion of procedures (default: 2)

extractionModelTier.description: Model tier for extraction pipeline (extract-reinforcement LLM). 'nano' or 'default' saves cost and avoids locking the main model; unset = heavy. Expert/Full presets use 'default'.

languageKeywords.description: Multi-language detection: auto-build .language-keywords.json from memory samples (triggers, categories, correction signals).

autoBuild.description: When true, build once at startup if file missing, then weekly (default: true)

reflection.description: Synthesize behavioral patterns from facts (memory_reflect, reflect-rules).

defaultWindow.description: Time window in days for fact gathering (default: 14)

minObservations.description: Min observations to support a pattern (default: 2)

identityPromotion.description: Promote repeated durable identity reflections into separate durable persona state.

enabled.description: Enable durable persona-state promotion pipeline (default: true)

lookbackDays.description: Days of identity reflections considered for promotion (default: 90)

minDurableReflections.description: Repeated durable reflections required before promotion (default: 2)

similarityThreshold.description: Similarity threshold for grouping paraphrased reflections (default: 0.72)

maxPromotionsPerRun.description: Max persona-state promotions or upserts per run (default: 8)

enabled.description: Enable Write-Ahead Log for crash resilience (default: true)

walPath.description: Path to WAL file (default: same directory as SQLite DB)

maxAge.description: Maximum age of WAL entries before considered stale in ms (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)

wal.description: Write-Ahead Log for crash resilience (enabled by default)

archivalDays.description: Days before consolidated event log entries are archived (default: 90)

enabled.description: Enable agent self-evolution via gated persona proposals (default: false)

autoApply.description: When true, proposals are applied automatically without human review (default: false)

allowedFiles.description: Identity files that can be modified via proposals

maxProposalsPerWeek.description: Max proposals per week to prevent spam (default: 5)

personaProposals.description: Opt-in persona proposals: agent self-evolution with human approval gate (disabled by default)

enabled.description: Enable identity reflection synthesis and storage (default: false)

model.description: Optional model override for identity reflection

defaultWindow.description: Days of recent reflection outputs to analyze (default: 30)

minInsights.description: Minimum number of pattern/rule/meta insights required before running (default: 3)

maxInsightsPerRun.description: Maximum identity insights stored per run (default: 8)

identityReflection.description: Identity reflection layer — synthesize persona-level insights from reflection outputs

enabled.description: Enable graph-based spreading activation for zero-LLM recall; when true, also runs multilingual PERSON/ORG enrichment (franc + LLM) after memory_store and powers memory_directory contact/org views

autoLink.description: Auto-create RELATED_TO links to similar facts when storing (default: false)

autoLinkLimit.description: Max similar facts to link per storage (default: 3)

maxTraversalDepth.description: Max hops for graph traversal in recall (default: 2)

useInRecall.description: Enable graph traversal in memory_recall (default: true)

strengthenOnRecall.description: Strengthen RELATED_TO links when facts are recalled together (default: false)

graph.description: Graph-based spreading activation: typed relationships for zero-LLM recall

requireApprovalForPromote.description: Require human move to promote auto-skill (default: true)

procedures.description: Procedural memory: auto-generated skills from learned patterns

semanticDedup.description: Skip storing facts that are semantically similar to existing ones (default: true)

toolsSection.description: TOOLS.md section heading for new rules (default: Self-correction rules)

applyToolsByDefault.description: When true (default), insert suggested TOOLS rules under toolsSection. Set false to only suggest (use --approve to apply). Use --no-apply-tools to skip applying for one run.

autoRewriteTools.description: When true, LLM rewrites TOOLS.md to integrate new rules (no duplicates/contradictions). When false, use section insert (default: false)

analyzeViaSpawn.description: When true and incidents > spawnThreshold, run Phase 2 via openclaw sessions spawn (Gemini, large context) (default: false)

spawnThreshold.description: Use spawn for Phase 2 when incident count exceeds this (default: 15)

spawnModel.description: Model for spawn when analyzeViaSpawn is true. Empty or unset = use provider default from config (Gemini/OpenAI/Claude, same as maintenance cron jobs)

positiveRulesSection.description: TOOLS.md section heading for positive reinforcement rules (default: Positive Reinforcement Rules)

reinforcementLLMAnalysis.description: Run LLM analysis on reinforcement incidents to extract POSITIVE_RULE/MEMORY entries (default: true)

reinforcementToProposals.description: Write PROPOSAL remediations from reinforcement analysis to proposalsDB (default: true)

agentsRuleToProposals.description: Write AGENTS_RULE remediations from self-correction to proposalsDB (default: true)

selfCorrection.description: Self-correction analysis: semantic dedup, TOOLS sectioning, auto-rewrite vs approve, optional Phase 2 via spawn

orchestratorId.description: Agent ID of the orchestrator (main agent). This agent sees all scopes. Default: 'main'.

defaultStoreScope.description: Default scope for new facts: 'global' (all agents, backward compatible), 'agent' (specialists auto-scope), or 'auto' (orchestrator→global, specialists→agent). Default: 'global'.

multiAgent.description: Multi-agent memory scoping: dynamic agent detection and scope defaults

enabled.description: Enable dynamic memory tiering hot/warm/cold (default: true in normal+ presets)

hotMaxTokens.description: Max tokens for HOT tier at session start (default: 2000)

inactivePreferenceDays.description: Days without access to treat as inactive (default: 7)

hotMaxFacts.description: Cap HOT tier facts when promoting (default: 50)

paths.description: Glob patterns relative to workspace (e.g. skills/**/*.md, TOOLS.md)

chunkSize.description: Chunk size in chars for LLM extraction (default: 800)

ingest.description: Ingest workspace markdown files as facts

hydeEnabled.description: Use HyDE query expansion for vector search (default: false)

nightlyCycle.description: Nightly dream cycle: prune, consolidate, reflect

passiveObserver.description: Background fact extraction from session transcripts

disabledProviders.description: Provider ids to exclude from automatic LLM selection (e.g. openai, anthropic, google). Same as parseLLMConfig / hybrid-mem config-set.

llm.description: LLM model preference lists per tier (default, heavy, nano)

trajectoryLLMAnalysis.description: Top-level alias for implicitFeedback.trajectoryLLMAnalysis. Use LLM-based trajectory analysis instead of heuristic lesson extraction (default: false). The nested key is deprecated.

feedToSelfCorrection.description: Top-level alias for implicitFeedback.feedToSelfCorrection. Feed negative implicit signals into the self-correction pipeline (default: true). The nested key is deprecated.

extractReinforcement.description: Top-level alias for distill.extractReinforcement. Enable reinforcement extraction from sessions (default: true). The nested key is deprecated.

enabled.description: Enable ACTIVE-TASKS.md injection and related tooling (default: true)

filePath.description: Path to ACTIVE-TASKS.md relative to OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE or absolute (default: ACTIVE-TASKS.md)

injectionBudget.description: Token budget for active-task injection summary (default: 500)

staleThreshold.description: Duration string after which a task row is stale (e.g. 24h, 7d)

enabled.description: Inject stale-task warnings alongside the summary (default: true)

heartbeatEscalation.description: On heartbeat-pattern user messages, append a task-hygiene nudge for ACTIVE-TASKS.md rows (default: true)

suggestGoalAfterTaskAgeDays.description: If >0, heartbeat hygiene nudges long-running tasks (days since Updated). 0 = off (default: 0)

heartbeatNudgeMaxChars.description: Max characters for the heartbeat hygiene block (default: 2500, min 200 in parser)

taskHygiene.description: Heartbeat nudges for tactical tasks; see docs/TASK-HYGIENE.md

activeTask.description: Working memory file ACTIVE-TASKS.md: injection, stale warnings, optional heartbeat hygiene

goalsDir.description: Relative to workspace; goal JSON store (default: state/goals)

model.description: Optional dedicated stewardship model (default: null = cron default)

heartbeatStewardship.description: Inject stewardship on heartbeat turns (default: true)

watchdogHealthCheck.description: Run deterministic checks on plugin timer (default: true)

heartbeatPatterns.description: Heartbeat regex sources; empty = built-in defaults

multiGoalMaxChars.description: Combined character cap for multi-goal stewardship prepend

heartbeatRefreshActiveTask.description: On heartbeat, refresh ACTIVE-TASKS.md Goals mirror

allowCommandVerification.description: Allow command_exit_zero goal verification in the watchdog (shell execution). Default: false — must be explicitly opted in.

enabled.description: Trip goals stuck with unchanged blockers across assessments (default: false until tuned)

sameBlockerRepeatLimit.description: Consecutive assessments with same blocker fingerprint before blocking; 0 = off

maxAssessmentsWithoutProgress.description: Block when assessments since last blocker change reach this; 0 = off

composeHumanSummary.description: Include full history in humanEscalationSummary (default: true)

appendMemoryEscalation.description: Append escalation to workspace memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md (default: true)

circuitBreaker.description: Stop retry loops; escalate to human with summary (see docs/GOAL-STEWARDSHIP-OPERATOR.md)

goalStewardship.description: Long-running goal registry, stewardship injection, and watchdog (see docs/GOAL-STEWARDSHIP-DESIGN.md)
